creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
Error when installing the port as described:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2010-December/064858.html

ERROR:  Error installing /usr/ports/distfiles/rubygem/mail-2.2.10.gem:
        mail requires i18n (~> 0.4.1, runtime)
*** Error code 1

An update to 2.2.12 appears to sort this on my test systems.

How-To-Repeat: Try installing the port on a cleanish system!
